text:
I executed a single transaction that inserted one GitHub issue for every merged pull request (across any repo) that closes a Linear issue, all targeting 'acme/web'.

Exactly 1 issue was opened.

text:
I executed a single transaction that inserted one GitHub issue for every merged pull request (across any repo) that closes a Linear issue, all targeting 'acme/web'.
